title: Governance Self-Healing
purpose: Implement governance self-healing mechanisms to reduce manual remediation, repair predictable runtime inconsistencies, and improve execution continuity.
architectural_constraints: Human approval required for destructive healing
acceptance_criteria: Stale locks auto-released with event emission
Missing indexes detected but not auto-created
All healing actions create audit trail
Recovery snapshots generated before destructive healing

failure_modes.mitigation: Reversibility requirement, snapshot before healing, human approval for destructive actions
Always emit investigation suggestion alongside healing, never auto-resolve investigations
